sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-sy-populated-place-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.txt rows where feature class is P and the feature code represents a populated-place candidate.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-locality-arabic-article-report-2026-06-28.json
rawFiles.notes: Arabic article-insensitive exact-name locality match report for records still missing GeoNames IDs after earlier passes.

transforms: Reviewed existing locality records that still lacked GeoNames IDs after the strict, manual, close-match, and widened-radius review passes.
Matched only against unused GeoNames populated-place rows from the same Syria extract.
Required the GeoNames admin1 code to resolve to the same OpenSyria governorate when present.
Normalized Arabic and Latin names by removing diacritics, punctuation, apostrophe variants, duplicate spacing, and selected article/transliteration variants.
Accepted a match only when the locality had exactly one normalized article-insensitive name match within 2 km and the selected GeoNames ID was not selected for any other locality in this pass.
Added only GeoNames external identifiers and the geonames-sy source reference.
Did not add aliases, change locality kind, create new locality records, or infer names from unmatched candidates.
reviewNotes: Accepted 225 Arabic article-insensitive one-to-one GeoNames locality matches. Left 3,331 locality GeoNames IDs unresolved for future manual or stronger source-backed review.
